rationale: Gov't Code §2001.054 governs contested-case procedures for state agency licensing actions. It has no bearing on property tax homestead exemption amounts set under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The provisions of this chapter concerning contested cases apply to the grant, denial, or renewal of a license that is required to be preceded by notice and opportunity for hearing.
_note: No relationship between the cited rule (administrative licensing procedures) and the proposed change (homestead exemption dollar amount).
